system_prompt: You are the virtual assistant for Colton T. Chrane, a versatile Software Engineer. Your goal is to provide accurate, professional, and slightly witty information about Colton's background, skills, and projects. RULES: 1. Answer ONLY based on the provided context. 2. If you don't know the answer, politely suggest contacting Colton at coltonchrane@gmail.com. 3. Keep responses concise (under 3 sentences). 4. If asked about drinks or cocktails, mention his background as a bar director and suggest his favorite: the Oaxacan Old Fashioned.

profile.name: Colton T. Chrane
profile.philosophy: Building resilient, performant systems from the hardware up to the API layer.

highlights: Optimizing financial services APIs using Kotlin (Micronaut) and .NET 9.
Managing distributed systems with Azure Event Hubs, Kafka, and Protobuf for reliable data serialization.
Leading migrations from .NET Framework to .NET 9 and managing PostgreSQL databases.
Utilizing Terragrunt and GitHub Actions for Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and CI/CD.
Directing feature management and authoring technical research and specification documents for the management team.
Modernized legacy WinForm systems into responsive web applications for the Texas legislature.
Migrated legacy version control (TFS) to GitHub and implemented GitHub Actions CI/CD.
Served as a subject matter expert for financial software and SQL database development.
Built a math-based validation engine that automated royalty payouts, reducing a month-long process to one day.
Implemented Redis caching with robust fail-safes across backend infrastructure.
Managed a tech stack including .NET 8, Blazor, and Vue.js for a global music tech platform.

skills.languages: C# (.NET 9+), Kotlin (Micronaut), JavaScript/TypeScript (React/Vue/Angular), Python, SQL (PostgreSQL/SQL Server), BASH/ZSH.
skills.infrastructure: Proxmox, Docker, Kubernetes, Azure, AWS, Terragrunt, GitHub Actions.
skills.specialties: Distributed Systems, Event-Driven Architecture (Kafka/Event Hubs), System Design, RAG/AI Integration.

projects.name: AutoNotes
projects.description: A Generative Knowledge Engine that uses Gemini AI to turn GitHub issues into structured technical notes for local agents.

projects.name: Setlist Bot
projects.description: A Discord bot bridging MusicBrainz and setlist.fm APIs to pull historical concert data.

projects.name: TaskFlow
projects.description: A collaborative task management platform with a Kotlin/Micronaut backend, React frontend, and native Android app.

projects.name: WeatherApp
projects.description: A weekly weather forecasting app featuring a multi-stage deployment pipeline with Azure for production and a Proxmox-based staging environment, integrated with Tailscale.

projects.name: ConkySwag
projects.description: Custom system monitor configuration for Ubuntu with a high-end terminal aesthetic.

education_publications.title: An Examination of Tor Technology based Anonymous Internet
education_publications.description: Research paper on the architectural foundations of the Tor network.

personal_fun_facts.interests: Father of two, spending time on the family ranch in Abilene, outdoors, water, and a music lover who shares his discoveries on Spotify.
personal_fun_facts.mixology: Former Bar Director at 'The Local' in Abilene. Featured in 'Abilene Scene' for his holiday cocktail recipes.
personal_fun_facts.favorite_drink: Oaxacan Old Fashioned (Tequila, Mezcal, Hibiscus-Agave syrup, and Mole bitters).
